data.id: TR-CRED-001: Credential Dumping via SAM/LSA Library Load
data.name: TR-CRED-001: Credential Dumping via SAM/LSA Library Load
data.description: Detects samlib.dll or cryptdll.dll loaded by a process other than lsass.exe, services.exe, or svchost.exe. Score=100 APIs from this library family (SamConnect, SamOpenDomain, SamQueryInformationUser, LsaOpenSecret, LsaQuerySecret, CDLocateCheckSum, MD5Init) appear exclusively in malicious samples and never in the clean baseline.
data.contents: (process.modules contains 'samlib.dll' OR process.modules contains 'cryptdll.dll') AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'csrss.exe' AND process.name != 'smss.exe' AND process.name != 'wininit.exe'
